{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Officer",
  "description": "Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial services to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	Approve loan applications within specified approval limits and refer applications outside approved limits to management for further approval.
	Meet with loan applicants to obtain required information and respond to inquiries regarding the loan application process.
	Analyze applicants&rsquo; financial status, credit history, and collateral/property valuations to determine loan feasibility.
	Explain available loan products, credit options, and applicable terms and conditions to customers.
	Obtain, verify, and compile loan applicants&rsquo; credit histories, corporate financial statements, and other relevant financial documentation.
	Review, update, and maintain accurate credit and loan files in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure compliance with credit policies, risk management guidelines, and regulatory standards.
	Provide periodic reports on loan portfolio performance as required.
	Field work
	You must have received your certificate


Why Work with Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited?


	If you desire to work in an organization where employee motivation is key and passion is rewarded, then Bosak MFB might be the place for you.
	We are committed to building an open and rewarding work environment where all employees have equal opportunities for growth to realize their full potential.
	Our remuneration and employee welfare packages are among the best in the industry.


We offer the following Benefits:


	Salary: N100,000 &ndash; N140,000 Monthly.
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave &amp; Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@bosakmfb.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Loan Officer&rdquo;as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-01",

  },

    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Business Officer Job at Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited




        
    

        
        Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited was incorporated in December 2009 with the business objective of providing financial services to micro clients who were excluded from the mainstream financial system. It commenced operations in June 2010 upon obtaining a Unit Microfinance Banking License from the Central Bank of Nigeria. It later obtained a State Microfinance Banking License in 2016.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Officer

Job Location: Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Approve loan applications within specified approval limits and refer applications outside approved limits to management for further approval.
	Meet with loan applicants to obtain required information and respond to inquiries regarding the loan application process.
	Analyze applicants’ financial status, credit history, and collateral/property valuations to determine loan feasibility.
	Explain available loan products, credit options, and applicable terms and conditions to customers.
	Obtain, verify, and compile loan applicants’ credit histories, corporate financial statements, and other relevant financial documentation.
	Review, update, and maintain accurate credit and loan files in line with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure compliance with credit policies, risk management guidelines, and regulatory standards.
	Provide periodic reports on loan portfolio performance as required.
	Field work
	You must have received your certificate


Why Work with Bosak Microfinance Bank Limited?


	If you desire to work in an organization where employee motivation is key and passion is rewarded, then Bosak MFB might be the place for you.
	We are committed to building an open and rewarding work environment where all employees have equal opportunities for growth to realize their full potential.
	Our remuneration and employee welfare packages are among the best in the industry.


We offer the following Benefits:


	Salary: N100,000 – N140,000 Monthly.
	HMO
	Constant Training and Development
	Leave & Passage Allowance
	13th Month.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Loan Officer”as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "ShogxyPro Outsourcing is a forward-thinking HR and talent solutions firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, compliance management, and workforce development for businesses across various industries.

Our goal is simple: help organizations grow by connecting them with the right people and building compliant, efficient HR systems. We serve startups, SMEs, and large enterprises looking to scale without the burden of in-house HR challenges.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Project Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Strong experience in fiber deployment (FTTH/OSP/ISP)
	Good project management and coordination skills
	Sound technical knowledge of fiber (splicing, testing, OTDR, etc.)
	Ability to manage teams and meet project timelines


Requirements


	Strong experience in fiber deployment (FTTH/OSP/ISP)
	Good project management and coordination skills
	Sound technical knowledge of fiber (splicing, testing, OTDR, etc.)
	Ability to manage teams and meet project timelines.

Fiber Project Manager Job at ShogxyPro Outsourcing




        
    

        
        ShogxyPro Outsourcing is a forward-thinking HR and talent solutions firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, compliance management, and workforce development for businesses across various industries.

Our goal is simple: help organizations grow by connecting them with the right people and building compliant, efficient HR systems. We serve startups, SMEs, and large enterprises looking to scale without the burden of in-house HR challenges.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Project Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Strong experience in fiber deployment (FTTH/OSP/ISP)
	Good project management and coordination skills
	Sound technical knowledge of fiber (splicing, testing, OTDR, etc.)
	Ability to manage teams and meet project timelines


Requirements


	Strong experience in fiber deployment (FTTH/OSP/ISP)
	Good project management and coordination skills
	Sound technical knowledge of fiber (splicing, testing, OTDR, etc.)
	Ability to manage teams and meet project timelines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Public Relations Specialist",
  "description": "OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world&rsquo;s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers &mdash; bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Relations Specialist
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Draft and distribute press releases in line with the brand communication strategy.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with key local media outlets to increase brand visibility and reputation.
	Maintain regular contact with media, KOLs, KOCs, and tech bloggers to coordinate timely and high-quality promotional content.
	Monitor and manage public opinion, especially during negative publicity or incidents, ensuring timely and effective crisis communication.
	Provide support to the broader marketing department as required.


Educational Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Public Relations, Mass Communication, Marketing, or a related field.
	Minimum of 4 years of experience in public relations, media relations, or communications.
	Strong writing, editing, and content development skills.
	Established network with media professionals and influencers is an added advantage.
	Experience in crisis communication and public opinion management.
	Excellent interpersonal, communication, and negotiation skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;cvpool2021@oppo-aed.ng&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.",

Public Relations Specialist Job at OPPO




        
    

        
        OPPO, founded in 2004, is one of the world’s leading innovators in smart devices and mobile technology. With operations in over 60 countries and regions, Dedicated to delivering cutting-edge innovation, premium user experiences, and stylish designs. OPPO continues to expand its footprint with over 290,000 points of sale and 1,900 official service centers — bringing the beauty of technology closer to people every day

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Public Relations Specialist
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities

	Draft and distribute press releases in line with the brand communication strategy.

Educational Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Public Relations, Mass Communication, Marketing, or a related field.

	Strong writing, editing, and content development skills.
	Established network with media professionals and influencers is an added advantage.
	Experience in crisis communication and public opinion management.
	Excellent interpersonal, communication, and negotiation skills.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Financial Control & Compliance Lead",
  "description": "PZ Cussons is a dynamic consumer products group and innovator of some of the world&#39;s best known and loved brands. Calling on over 130 years of expertise, we operate internationally in carefully selected developed and emerging markets that present the greatest strategic potential for future growth. Our world-class supply chain and distribution networks enable us to meet our global consumer needs and deliver quality brands that add value and enhance everyday lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Financial Control &amp; Compliance Lead

Job ID: JR002790
Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Accountabilities / Responsibilities


	Influence, communicate and liaise with all levels of the business, including management, ALT and Board level as required.
	Be a subject matter expert in the key risks and controls across PZC finance and Entity Level Controls &ndash; and wider across the group, as required.
	Create and develop relationships and networks across the whole of PZC, which will inform and create opportunities to cross-skill and share information, working in partnership, improving risk and controls understanding, awareness of the three lines of defense and business performance.
	Proactively use relationships and networks to identify and analyse opportunities for financial risk and control improvement.
	Liaise with internal and external auditors to share information and address risks / issues identified.
	Oversee the tracking, monitoring and reporting of remediation actions raised by internal and external audit &ndash; working with all business areas as required.
	Proactively analyse and investigate situations identified and create new, unique and pragmatic solutions to address/improve issues identified, including practical implementation of solutions, communication, stakeholder buy in and monitoring.
	Identify, escalate, define and execute special and ad hoc work as required, including leading and taking responsibility for financial internal control projects, and provide SME support for any special investigations and assistance to business areas where required
	Perform regular analytics and challenge status quo in identifying risks and controls across finance and work with the Process Owners to identify and implement financial improvement and/or efficiency improvements for the business as a whole, influencing management to implement the required process and behavioral changes e.g. compliance with travel and expense policies
	Using analytical data, identify areas for further investigation or remedial action, define and action as appropriate.
	Implement, monitor and action as required to ensure &ndash; robust testing and audit practices when performing all audit work.
	Reporting to senior management including status reports and dashboard including identification of themes and trends, creation of resultant actions / consequences.
	Perform testing and audit monitoring / follow-up work as appropriate to evaluate the existence and effectiveness of corrective action (via re-visit or contact with management).
	Identify requirements and monitor and report adherence to external business requirements and legislation Identify requirements and monitor and report adherence to internal policies and procedures across the group.
	Remain current with requirements and proactively identify opportunities to improve existing processes.
	Create new efficient and effective initiatives to address work requirements, e.g. new methods of testing, training or communication


Role requirements
Knowledge / Qualifications:


	University Degree
	Minimum 5 years of post-qualification experience
	Qualified accountant / Internal or external Auditor
	Proven track record when operating in an ICFR / SOX environment either locally or as part of a multi-national Group


Technical / Professional Experience:


	Is considered to have foundation competency in Reporting, Performance Management, Analysis &amp; Insight, and Business Understanding.
	Is considered to have fully operational competency in Accounting, Risk Management, Systems &amp; Processes, and Business Impact.
	Is considered to have a mastery competency in Controls.
	FMCG experience preferred
	Experience of performing analytical review and systematically identifying which data to gather, which sources to use, to gather information from a variety of sources, analyse information, identify implications of data, draw appropriate conclusions, generate viable alternative solutions to a question or problem, and evaluate the consequences of choosing each alternative
	Knowledge of and ability to challenge financial processes.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-14",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "PZ Cussons"
    
  },

Financial Control & Compliance Lead Job at PZ Cussons




        
    

        
        PZ Cussons is a dynamic consumer products group and innovator of some of the world's best known and loved brands. Calling on over 130 years of expertise, we operate internationally in carefully selected developed and emerging markets that present the greatest strategic potential for future growth. Our world-class supply chain and distribution networks enable us to meet our global consumer needs and deliver quality brands that add value and enhance everyday lives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Control & Compliance Lead

Job ID: JR002790
Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Accountabilities / Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Influence, communicate and liaise with all levels of the business, including management, ALT and Board level as required.
	Be a subject matter expert in the key risks and controls across PZC finance and Entity Level Controls – and wider across the group, as required.
	Create and develop relationships and networks across the whole of PZC, which will inform and create opportunities to cross-skill and share information, working in partnership, improving risk and controls understanding, awareness of the three lines of defense and business performance.
	Proactively use relationships and networks to identify and analyse opportunities for financial risk and control improvement.
	Liaise with internal and external auditors to share information and address risks / issues identified.
	Oversee the tracking, monitoring and reporting of remediation actions raised by internal and external audit – working with all business areas as required.
	Proactively analyse and investigate situations identified and create new, unique and pragmatic solutions to address/improve issues identified, including practical implementation of solutions, communication, stakeholder buy in and monitoring.
	Identify, escalate, define and execute special and ad hoc work as required, including leading and taking responsibility for financial internal control projects, and provide SME support for any special investigations and assistance to business areas where required
	Perform regular analytics and challenge status quo in identifying risks and controls across finance and work with the Process Owners to identify and implement financial improvement and/or efficiency improvements for the business as a whole, influencing management to implement the required process and behavioral changes e.g. compliance with travel and expense policies
	Using analytical data, identify areas for further investigation or remedial action, define and action as appropriate.
	Implement, monitor and action as required to ensure – robust testing and audit practices when performing all audit work.
	Reporting to senior management including status reports and dashboard including identification of themes and trends, creation of resultant actions / consequences.
	Perform testing and audit monitoring / follow-up work as appropriate to evaluate the existence and effectiveness of corrective action (via re-visit or contact with management).
	Identify requirements and monitor and report adherence to external business requirements and legislation Identify requirements and monitor and report adherence to internal policies and procedures across the group.
	Remain current with requirements and proactively identify opportunities to improve existing processes.
	Create new efficient and effective initiatives to address work requirements, e.g. new methods of testing, training or communication


Role requirements
Knowledge / Qualifications:


	University Degree
	Minimum 5 years of post-qualification experience
	Qualified accountant / Internal or external Auditor
	Proven track record when operating in an ICFR / SOX environment either locally or as part of a multi-national Group


Technical / Professional Experience:


	Is considered to have foundation competency in Reporting, Performance Management, Analysis & Insight, and Business Understanding.
	Is considered to have fully operational competency in Accounting, Risk Management, Systems & Processes, and Business Impact.
	Is considered to have a mastery competency in Controls.
	FMCG experience preferred
	Experience of performing analytical review and systematically identifying which data to gather, which sources to use, to gather information from a variety of sources, analyse information, identify implications of data, draw appropriate conclusions, generate viable alternative solutions to a question or problem, and evaluate the consequences of choosing each alternative
	Knowledge of and ability to challenge financial processes.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Felton Energy Services Limited (FESL) is an indigenous oil &amp; gas procurement, operation and maintenance company in Nigeria. The company was established to supply global customers with Electrical, Mechanical, Industrial and Engineering Products, on time and at the most competitive prices. FESL has unrivalled commitment to the Oil &amp; Gas Industry and has gained support of the leading manufacturers which ensures our solutions are at the forefront oftoday&rsquo;s technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Business Development Executive

Job Locations:&nbsp;Lekki - Lagos and&nbsp;Trans - Amadi, Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full time
Reports To: Business Development Manager
Slots: 6

Job Overview


	The Business Development Executive will support the Business Development team in identifying new business opportunities, building and managing client relationships, and contributing to revenue growth.
	This role is ideal for professionals with 1&ndash;2 years of experience, particularly those with exposure to banking, financial services, or sales-driven environments, who are eager to grow in a fast?paced corporate setting.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and research potential clients, markets, and business opportunities.
	Conduct market research to analyze industry trends and competitor activities.
	Support the development and maintenance of strong client relationships.
	Participate in client meetings and follow up on inquiries and leads.
	Assist in preparing proposals, presentations, and sales pitches.

Business Development Executive Job at Felton Energy Services Limited




        
    

        
        Felton Energy Services Limited (FESL) is an indigenous oil & gas procurement, operation and maintenance company in Nigeria. The company was established to supply global customers with Electrical, Mechanical, Industrial and Engineering Products, on time and at the most competitive prices. FESL has unrivalled commitment to the Oil & Gas Industry and has gained support of the leading manufacturers which ensures our solutions are at the forefront oftoday’s technology.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Locations: Lekki - Lagos and Trans - Amadi, Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full time
Reports To: Business Development Manager
Slots: 6

Job Overview


	The Business Development Executive will support the Business Development team in identifying new business opportunities, building and managing client relationships, and contributing to revenue growth.
	This role is ideal for professionals with 1–2 years of experience, particularly those with exposure to banking, financial services, or sales-driven environments, who are eager to grow in a fast?paced corporate setting.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and research potential clients, markets, and business opportunities.
	Conduct market research to analyze industry trends and competitor activities.
	Support the development and maintenance of strong client relationships.
	Participate in client meetings and follow up on inquiries and leads.
	Assist in preparing proposals, presentations, and sales pitches.
	Coordinate meetings and organize sales and business documentation.
	Maintain and update client records and opportunities in the CRM system.
	Monitor industry developments and share relevant business insights.
	Represent the company at networking, marketing, and promotional events.
	Perform other duties as assigned by the Business Development Lead.


Required Experience & Qualifications


	1–2 years of experience in business development, sales, or customer relationship roles (banking or financial services experience is an advantage).
	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Finance, or a related discipline.


Desired Skills & Competencies:


	Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to build client relationships.
	Basic understanding of sales, marketing, and business development principles.
	Self?motivated, proactive, and able to work independently and within a team.
	Excellent organizational and time?management skills with strong attention to detail.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint); basic knowledge of CRM tools is an advantage.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Qualified candidates can start immediately.
